{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The wearer of Snail Shell is protected from the cold and will be able to unleash a freezing beam to fight their enemies.
|affct=ART
|hard=DEF
|source=Divine Chaos Chest (0.4%)
|color=blue
|earth=5
|water=3
|fire=2
|wind=4
|form=Demon
|element=Fire
|realm=Koreyo
|orangehard=DEF
}}
